heading: Limitation on certain amounts paid to employee-owners by personal service corporations electing alternative taxable years
label: 280H Limitation on certain amounts paid to employee-owners by personal service corporations electing alternative taxable years
notes: Amendments1988—Subsecs. (c)(1)(A)(i), (d)(1). , substituted “amounts paid” for “amounts paid or incurred”.Pub. L. 100–647, § 2004(e)(14)(C)Subsec. (f)(2). , substituted “section 269A(b)(2) (as modified by section 441(i)(2))” for “section 296A(b)(2)”.Pub. L. 100–647, § 2004(e)(3)Subsec. (f)(4). , amended par. (4) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (4) read as follows: “The term ‘adjusted taxable income’ means taxable income increased by any amount paid or incurred to an employee-owner which was includible in the gross income of such employee-owner.”Pub. L. 100–647, § 2004(e)(14)(A)Subsec. (f)(5). , added par. (5).Pub. L. 100–647, § 2004(e)(2)(B)

children.text: an election by a personal service corporation under section 444 is in effect for a taxable year, and
such corporation does not meet the minimum distribution requirements of subsection (c) for such taxable year,

children.heading: Carryover of nondeductible amounts
children.label: b Carryover of nondeductible amounts
children.text: If any amount is not allowed as a deduction for a taxable year under subsection (a), such amount shall be treated as paid or incurred in the succeeding taxable year.

children.label: i
children.text: the applicable amounts paid during the preceding taxable year, divided by the number of months in such taxable year, multiplied by

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of months in the deferral period of the preceding taxable year, or

children.label: B
children.text: the applicable percentage of the adjusted taxable income for the deferral period of the taxable year.

children.label: A
children.text: the applicable amounts paid or incurred during the 3 taxable years immediately preceding the taxable year, by

children.label: B
children.text: the adjusted taxable income of such corporation for such 3 taxable years.
the applicable amounts paid during the deferral period, plus

children.label: A
children.text: the amount determined under paragraph (1), divided by the number of months in the deferral period, multiplied by

children.label: B
children.text: the number of months in the nondeferral period.

children.heading: Disallowance of net operating loss carrybacks
children.label: e Disallowance of net operating loss carrybacks
children.text: No net operating loss carryback shall be allowed to (or from) any taxable year of a personal service corporation to which an election under section 444 applies.

children.heading: Other definitions and special rules
children.label: f Other definitions and special rules
A
children.text: any gain from the sale or exchange of property between the owner-employee and the corporation, or

children.label: B
children.text: any dividend paid by the corporation.

children.heading: Employee-owner
children.label: 2 Employee-owner
children.text: The term “employee-owner” has the meaning given such term by section 269A(b)(2) (as modified by section 441(i)(2)).

children.heading: Deferral period
children.label: A Deferral period
children.text: The term “deferral period” has the meaning given to such term by section 444(b)(4).

children.heading: Nondeferral period
children.label: B Nondeferral period
children.text: The term “nondeferral period” means the portion of the taxable year of the personal service corporation which occurs after the portion of such year constituting the deferral period.

children.label: A
children.text: any amount paid to an employee-owner which is includible in the gross income of such employee-owner, and

children.label: B
children.text: any net operating loss carryover to the extent such carryover is attributable to amounts described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Personal service corporation
children.label: 5 Personal service corporation
children.text: The term “personal service corporation” has the meaning given to such term by section 441(i)(2).
